case_title: MATTHEW WAKEFIELD et al VS. CHIYEKO KIMURA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,413.43 FILED BY WAKEFIELD, MATTHEW CRUZ, LEIA AS TO DEFENDANT KIMURA, CHIYEKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAKEFIELD, MATTHEW CRUZ, LEIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIMURA, CHIYEKO $2,080.31 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,168.31, (1) DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR HER PREVIOUS PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFFS, IF PAYMENT HAS BEEN RECEIVED AND ACCEPTED BY PLAINTIFF. (2) THE COURT DETERMINES THE DEFENDANT DID NOT FOLLOW REQUIRED PROCEDURES FOR THE UTILITY PASS-THROUGH, AND DISALLOWED THAT DEDUCTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WAKEFIELD, MATTHEW
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WAKEFIELD, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT KIMURA, CHIYEKO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JUL-17-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KIMURA, CHIYEKO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KIMURA, CHIYEKO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
